alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google in Commercial Operations and Devices/Services scaling; does not include front-line business development, quota-carrying sales, or cold-calling track record
alignments.job_requirement: Prospecting and cold calling into target accounts to initiate qualified meetings

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google; demonstrated ability to learn and scale complex global commercial systems
alignments.job_requirement: Work in a structured manner & fast learner with excellent communication skills

alignments.candidate_evidence: Professional/fluent English; native German. No stated Nordic language proficiency
alignments.job_requirement: Native or equivalent proficiency in Nordic language (Swedish, Finnish, Danish) and English

gaps.gap: Entry-level sales development scope: role targets student/intern BDR with 6 months full-time availability, not strategic operations leadership
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is overqualified for the internship pathway and career arc; would be misaligned with program design

gaps.gap: Nordic language requirement: JD requires native/equivalent proficiency in Swedish, Finnish, or Danish; candidate has no stated Nordic language skills
gaps.mitigation: No viable workaround; language is a hard operational requirement for Madrid-based Nordic market prospecting

gaps.gap: Front-line BDR and quota-carrying sales experience: candidate background is operations, commercial strategy, and transformation, not sales development or cold-calling
gaps.mitigation: Cold-calling and prospecting are core duties, not strategic adjacencies; no evidence of hands-on sales prospecting or AE support

hard_blockers.evidence: Native (or equivalent) proficiency in a Nordic language (Swedish, Finish, Danish) + Native (or equivalent) proficiency in English. Candidate profile shows professional/fluent English and native German, with no stated Nordic language proficiency. The JD specifies this as a hard requirement for the Madrid-based Nordic market role.

output.level_rationale: Entry-level internship / BDR program targeting students and near-graduates with 6 months full-time availability and no prior full-time experience required. explicitly described as standard path into BDR without previous experience = Google-equivalent L3 (0–2 years, intern tier).
output.summary: This is an L3 entry-level sales development / BDR internship program designed for students and near-graduates with no prior full-time sales experience. The candidate is an eight-year senior Commercial Operations leader at Google with strategic transformation and global scaling experience. Core misalignments include: (1) scope is junior BDR prospecting and cold calling vs. candidate's strategic operations and transformation background; (2) mandatory Nordic language proficiency is not met; (3) the role is intentionally designed as an internship pathway, not a senior leadership position. The candidate is overqualified for the program's career arc and lacks the entry-level sales development profile the JD targets.
uncertainties: Role family classification: JD emphasizes BDR prospecting and account research, which falls under deprioritized "pure quota-carrying sales" and junior analyst scope, not Strategy and Operations or approved stretches
Company size/stage not stated; Celonis is described as a fast-growing SaaS company but no headcount or funding stage given, limiting seniority context
